Welcome to SFI Foundation
The SFI Foundation, Inc. (SFI) is a non-profit organization established to issue and administer standards for the quality assurance of specialty performance and racing equipment. The SFI Foundation has served the automotive aftermarket and the motorsports industry since 1978. Our service to the industry is a system of developing and administering various standards, certifications and testing criteria for use in motorsports.
About SFI


Learn how SFI got established as the leader in performance standards and safety.

Learn More
Specifications


The program is designed to promote fairness in the motorsports industries.

View Specifications
Manufacturers


View the list of certified manufacturers that participate in each Specs Program.

View Manufacturers
News


Get news and event updates about the motorsports and racing industries.

Read More
Incident Response Training
SFI offers an Incident Response Training Program for bringing safety awareness to race track personnel. The Drag Race Incident Response Training Program began in 2000.

Learn More
Tech Inspector Certification
In addition to requiring certified equipment to be used in their events, race sanctioning bodies recognize the need for certification and training programs for their personnel who work at the facilities hosting their events.

Learn More
